description: Product category hierarchy. Supports nested categories via parent_category_id.

chunks.text:
TABLE: categories

DESCRIPTION: Product category hierarchy. Supports nested categories via parent_category_id.

NATURAL_LANGUAGE_TERMS: categories, product categories, category hierarchy, product types, product classification, departments, sections

PRIMARY_KEY: category_id

FOREIGN_KEYS: none

COLUMNS: category_id, category_name, parent_category_id, category_level, description, created_at

USE_CASES: Filter products by category, category breakdown, sales by department
